reviews.author: Esha Akies
reviews.text: AJ and his son came out to fix my flat. They were very knowledgeable and had GREAT customer service. He explained what the issue was with my tire (the RIM) and he assured me if the rim cause another issue to call him back. Satisfaction guaranteed. And the best part 30 mins top for the fix 🥰

reviews.author: Eureka Mason
reviews.text: Needed a leak in my tire checked. AJ came right out and did an AMAZING job. Pricing was also great. You know a person is gifted at what they do when they can hear a nail in the tire of a car passing by. Anymore tire issues....I will definitely call AJ! Thank you

reviews.author: youngswordfish
reviews.text: He came out really fast and helped me with a popped tire and stripped bolt didn’t charge me anything crazy worth checking him professional and nice also works fast

reviews.author: Drew
reviews.text: I needed a tire plugged, was in and out in less than 20 minutes. Nice friendly people, will use again. Support your local business!

reviews.author: Jon Walton
reviews.text: AJ was very quick with his response. He came out the next day to mount some old tires on new wheels! Prices were FANTASTIC and I would recommend to anyone. Not to mention the convenience of not having to leave my home 👍
